title: Ld-12 laser defense satellite platform
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Defense Satellite}}
[[File:Ld-12LaserDefenseSatellite-FOC.jpg|thumb|right|200px|An Ld-12 laser defense satellite.]]
The '''Ld-12 laser defense satellite''' was an armed [[Satellite/Legends|satellite]] platform developed by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] for the defense of orbital installations and targets such as space stations, construction docks and industrial platforms.

The Ld-12 housed twin rapid-firing [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] best suited for attacking fighters. However, the cannons could also prove a threat to frigate-sized craft.

Like the [[Md-12 missile defense satellite platform]], this modular cannon was developed to be built on an easily-modifiable, general-purpose satellite base.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
